summary: Accepted after widening the packet model to allow declared collateral. The original agent fix changed QuickList representation for SORT STORE, which required AOF rewrite iteration collateral.

scope_result.original_failure: crates/redis-commands/src/aof.rs was changed outside the packet targets
scope_result.resolution: The packet now declares crates/redis-commands/src/aof.rs as allowed_collateral because SORT STORE list representation is persisted by AOF rewrite.

checks.notes: Completed before smoke was interrupted; warnings were pre-existing.

checks.command: git diff --check -- crates/redis-commands/src/aof.rs crates/redis-commands/src/eval.rs crates/redis-commands/src/sort.rs crates/redis-core/src/object.rs harness/work-packets.jsonl harness/loop/prompt-template.md harness/evidence/ledger.jsonl

allowed_collateral.why: SORT STORE uses the same list representation persisted by AOF rewrite.
